concept: I'd fancy a game where I manage a pocket dimension inside an ordinary backpack, organizing items of various shapes while maximizing space. Different objects interact in unexpected ways when placed next to each other, creating chain reactions that can be either beneficial or disastrous. The backpack's owner faces increasingly complex daily challenges that require specific items to be accessible at a moment's notice. Dimensional anomalies occasionally create temporary expansions or contractions of available space, requiring quick reorganization strategies.
